2604.08948.title: TaxPraBen: A Scalable Benchmark for Structured Evaluation of LLMs in Chinese Real-World Tax Practice
2604.08948.paper_summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in various general domains, they exhibit notable gaps in the highly specialized, knowledge-intensive, and legally regulated Chinese tax domain. Consequently, while tax-related benchmarks are gaining attention, many focus on isolated NLP tasks, neglecting real-world practical capabilities. To address this issue, we introduce TaxPraBen, the first dedicated benchmark for Chinese taxation practice. It combines 10 traditional application tasks, along with 3 pioneering real-world scenarios: tax risk prevention, tax inspection analysis, and tax strategy planning, sourced from 14 datasets totaling 7.3K instances. TaxPraBen features a scalable structured evaluation paradigm designed through process of "structured parsing-field alignment extraction-numerical and textual matching", enabling end-to-end tax practice assessment while being extensible to other domains. We evaluate 19 LLMs based on Bloom's taxonomy. The results indicate significant performance disparities: all closed-source large-parameter LLMs excel, and Chinese LLMs like Qwen2.5 generally exceed multilingual LLMs, while the YaYi2 LLM, fine-tuned with some tax data, shows only limited improvement. TaxPraBen serves as a vital resource for advancing evaluations of LLMs in practical applications.
2604.08948.paper_summary_zh: 雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）在各種通用領域中表現出色，但在高度專業、知識密集且受法律規範的中國稅務領域中，它們顯示出顯著的差距。<lb/>因此，儘管與稅務相關的基準正在受到關注，但許多基準專注於孤立的自然語言處理任務，忽視了現實世界的實用能力。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們推出了TaxPraBen，首個專門針對中國稅務實踐的基準。<lb/>它結合了10個傳統應用任務，以及3個開創性的現實場景：稅務風險預防、稅務稽查分析和稅務策略規劃，這些場景來自14個數據集，共計7.3K實例。<lb/>TaxPraBen具有可擴展的結構化評估範式，通過“結構化解析-領域對齊提取-數值和文本匹配”的過程設計，實現端到端的稅務實踐評估，同時可以擴展到其他領域。<lb/>我們根據布魯姆的分類法評估了19個LLMs。<lb/>結果顯示出顯著的性能差異：所有封閉源的大參數LLMs表現優異，而像Qwen2.5這樣的中國LLMs通常超越多語言LLMs，而YaYi2 LLM在一些稅務數據上進行微調後僅顯示出有限的改善。<lb/>TaxPraBen作為推進LLMs在實際應用中評估的重要資源。
2604.08948.author: Gang Hu et.al.
2604.08948.authors: Gang Hu, Yating Chen, Haiyan Ding, Wang Gao, Jiajia Huang, Min Peng, Qianqian Xie, Kun Yu
